revisions_applied.fix: Clarified quantification procedure (three independent experiments, anti-HA lane intensity normalized to WT=1, Welch t-test) matching the experimental log description of Figure 4C.

Added explicit reference to Cross 1 and Cross 2 (the two independent EMA2 somatic KO crosses named in the experimental log) and noted that 'n' represents the total number of mating pairs tested, as stated in Figure 2C of the extraction.

notes: Two targeted fixes improve grounding against the experimental log without adding fabricated content. All numeric statements continue to trace directly to the extraction.
